scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.postinstall: npm run install-all && npm run build-frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:cov --prefix backend && npm run test:cov --prefix frontend
